title: Dad's 4th DUI — ignorance is bliss, lack of awareness as disrespect
html:
Dad's 4th DUI — ignorance is bliss, lack of awareness as disrespect

Source: 2024-09-18 Google Doc. Yahir reflects on learning about his father's 4th DUI (concealed by siblings to spare him stress). One of the rawest dad-relationship docs in the corpus.

TL;DR

  • The withholding: Yahir's siblings decided not to tell him about the September DUI. He frames this as kindness, the same way one wouldn't tell a frail grandmother bad news she can't act on. "Ignorance is definitely bliss in many instances."
  • The diagnosis: not hate, "hate is too strong" — but a lack of respect for how his father views and operates within the world. Specifically: lack of awareness as a choice, not a curse. "The lack of awareness isn't a curse, it's a lack of effort. That is something I don't respect."
  • Cam's framing borrowed: "of course this is fucked and an objectively bad thing. But it's also something that doesn't surprise anyone." Cam Jipp serves as moral co-witness here, same role as in many other thoughts-and-things docs.
  • Vittorio quote echoed: "everybody makes mistakes, but few learn from them."
  • The depressive equation diagnosed: shit factory job, kids gone or distanced (younger son being the only one still close), no friends, no hobbies, only home maintenance and food as pastimes — "It's not right for a man to stoop this low."
  • The "deal with the devil" frame: Yahir borrowed $800 from his dad and felt he had to call it "making a deal with the devil." Conversation length with dad has shrunk to <6 minutes; depth not reached in long time. Yahir owns this is on him too.
  • Closing position: "I am still my fathers son, he still is the man that put me on this earth. I owe him that much." Plans to better-establish the relationship "when the time is right" — not now.

Pattern observed

This is the clearest articulation of the dad-as-shadow figure that recurs in Yahir's writing. Compare to the warmer father-frame in the Aug 2025 RV doc ("This is how my dad can leave his legacy, he can help me on ramp to greatness. I am indebted to him for this option") — the father is alternately "dormant devil" and "legacy on-ramp" depending on what he's offering.

The "lack of awareness as lack of effort, not a curse" frame is Yahir's moral-philosophical framework for evaluating other people in general — the same standard he applies to Cam in the Aug 2025 IRL Lore Tab 7 critique ("not mission-driven, no self-imposed urgency"). Same template: not malice, just absence of effort.

The "if you change nothing, then nothing will change" line is the inverse-formulation of the McGregor "if you can see and speak it, it will happen" credo Yahir applies to himself.

Key quotes

  • "The lack of awareness isn't a curse, it's a lack of effort. That is something I don't respect."
  • "It's not right for a man to stoop this low."
  • "I am still my father's son, he still is the man that put me on this earth. I owe him that much."

Open questions

  • The siblings — who specifically decided to withhold? Likely Dominic + the older sister.
  • Has the relationship actually been "established" since? (By 2025 08 13 plan for austin dad gives Yahir an RV — physical generosity but conversational depth status unknown.)
  • Vittorio — recurring source of quoted wisdom; identity not yet stubbed.
